Brown]] | [[Liam Sutcliffe|Sutcliffe]] (4/5), [[Darnell McIntosh|McIntosh]] (3/3) | Unknown |{{cite web |title=Match Report: Doncaster RLFC 24–42 Hull FC |url=https://www.hullfc.com/blog/2024/01/21/match-report-doncaster-rlfc-24-42-hull-fc/ |publisher=Hull F.C. |access-date=19 October 2024 |date=21 January 2024}} |} ==Super League== {{main|2024 Super League}} ===Fixtures=== {{table alignment}} {| class="wikitable defaultleft col4center col7center col10right col12center" style="font-size:85%;" !Date and time!!Round!!Versus!!H/A!!Venue!!Result!!Score!!Tries!!Goals!!Attendance!!TV{{efn|Ahead of 2024, [[Sky Sports]] announced they would be broadcasting all Super League matches over the next three seasons.{{cite web |title=Sky Sports to show every Super League match live as part of historic new three-year TV rights deal |url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12196/12984274/sky-sports-to-show-every-super-league-match-live-as-part-of-historic-new-three-year-tv-rights-deal |access-date=19 October 2024 |work=Sky Sports |date=16 October 2023}} Exact TV channels can be sourced by using [https://web.archive.org/ WayBack Machine] on [https://www.rugbyleagueontv.com/ RugbyLeagueOnTV].
''NB'' Not all games were broadcast on Sky Sports TV (advertised as "Sky Sports Exclusives"), with the remainder being broadcast using their on demand services accessible online or via red button. These games were made available on Super League+, and a select few on the [[BBC]].{{cite news |title=Super League: BBC to show live games for first time after signing three-year broadcast deal |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/68229917 |access-date=19 October 2024 |work=BBC Sport |date=7 February 2024}} Further, games on Main Event were also broadcast on Action or Arena.}}!!Pos.!!Report |- | 17 February, 17:30 | Round 1 | {{leagueicon|Hull KR|16}} [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] | H | [[MKM Stadium]] | {{WinDL|res=L}} | 0–22 | | | 10,170 | [[Sky Sports]] Main Event | 11th |{{cite web |title=Match Report: Hull FC 0–22 Hull KR |url=https://www.hullfc.com/blog/2024/02/15/match-report-hull-fc-0-22-hull-kr/ |publisher=Hull F.C. |access-date=19 October 2024 |date=15 February 2024}} |- | 23 February, 20:00 | Round 2 | {{leagueicon|Warrington|16}} [[Warrington Wolves]] | A | [[Halliwell Jones Stadium]] | {{WinDL|res=L}} | 10–36 | [[Lewis Martin (rugby league)|Martin]], [[Jack Walker (rugby league)|Walker]] | [[Darnell McIntosh|McIntosh]] (1/2) | 9,431 | [[Sky Sports]] Arena | 11th |{{cite web |title=Match Report: Warrington Wolves 36–10 Hull FC |url=https://www.hullfc.com/blog/2024/02/23/match-report-warrington-wolves-36-10-hull-fc/ |publisher=Hull F.C. |access-date=19 October 2024 |date=23 February 2024}} |- | 3 March, 15:00 | Round 3 | {{leagueicon|London|16}} [[London Broncos]] | H | [[MKM Stadium]] | {{WinDL|res=W}} | 28–24 | Staveley, [[Matty Russell|Russell]], [[Lewis Martin (rugby league)|Martin]], [[Fa'amanu Brown|F.
